passwordReset.subject: Reset your Floodilka password
passwordReset.body:
Hello {username},

You requested to reset your Floodilka password. Please follow the link below to set a new password:

{resetUrl}

If you did not request this password reset, you can safely ignore this email.

This link will expire in 1 hour.

- Floodilka Team

emailVerification.subject: Verify your Floodilka email address
emailVerification.body:
Hello {username},

Please verify your email address for your Floodilka account by clicking the link below:

{verifyUrl}

If you did not create a Floodilka account, you can safely ignore this email.

This link will expire in 24 hours.

- Floodilka Team

emailChangeOriginal.subject: Confirm your Floodilka email change
emailChangeOriginal.body:
Hello {username},

We received a request to change the email on your Floodilka account.

To confirm this change, enter this code in the app:

{code}

This code expires at {expiresAt, date, full} {expiresAt, time, short}.

If you did not request this, please secure your account immediately.

- Floodilka Team

emailChangeNew.subject: Verify your new Floodilka email
emailChangeNew.body:
Hello {username},

Enter this code in the app to verify your new Floodilka email:

{code}

This code expires at {expiresAt, date, full} {expiresAt, time, short}.

If you did not request this, you can ignore this email.

accountDisabledSuspicious.subject: Your Floodilka account has been temporarily disabled

accountTempBanned.subject: Your Floodilka account has been temporarily suspended

accountScheduledDeletion.subject: Your Floodilka account is scheduled for deletion

selfDeletionScheduled.subject: Your Floodilka account deletion has been scheduled
selfDeletionScheduled.body:
Hello {username},

We're sad to see you go! Your Floodilka account has been scheduled for deletion.

Scheduled deletion date: {deletionDate, date, full} {deletionDate, time, short}

IMPORTANT: You can cancel this deletion at any time before {deletionDate, date, full} {deletionDate, time, short} by simply logging back in to your account.

BEFORE YOU GO:
Your Privacy Dashboard in User Settings allows you to:
- Delete your messages on the platform
- Extract any valuable data before departing

Please note: Once your account is deleted, there is no way to delete your messages. If you want to delete your messages, please do so through the Privacy Dashboard before your account deletion is finalised.

If you change your mind, just log back in to cancel the deletion.

- Floodilka Team

inactivityWarning.subject: Your Floodilka account will be deleted due to inactivity
inactivityWarning.body:
Hello {username},

We noticed you haven't logged in to your Floodilka account in over 2 years.

Last login: {lastActiveDate, date, full} {lastActiveDate, time, short}

As part of our data retention policy, inactive accounts are automatically scheduled for deletion. Your account will be permanently deleted on:

Scheduled deletion date: {deletionDate, date, full} {deletionDate, time, short}

HOW TO KEEP YOUR ACCOUNT:
Simply log in to your account at {loginUrl} before the deletion date to cancel this automatic deletion. No other action is required.

WHAT HAPPENS IF YOU DON'T LOG IN:
- Your account and all associated data will be permanently deleted
- Your messages will be anonymised (attributed to "Deleted User")
- This action cannot be reversed

WANT TO DELETE YOUR MESSAGES?
If you want to delete your messages before your account is deleted, please log in and use the Privacy Dashboard in User Settings.

We hope to see you back on Floodilka!

- Floodilka Team

harvestCompleted.subject: Your Floodilka Data Export is Ready
harvestCompleted.body:
Hello {username},

Your data export has been completed and is ready for download!

Export Summary:
- Total messages: {totalMessages, number}
- File size: {fileSizeMB} MB
- Format: ZIP archive with JSON files

Download your data: {downloadUrl}

IMPORTANT: This download link will expire on {expiresAt, date, full} {expiresAt, time, short}

What's included in your export:
- All your messages organised by channel
- Channel metadata
- Your user profile and account information
- Guild memberships and settings
- Authentication sessions and security information

The data is organised in JSON format for easy parsing and analysis.

If you have any questions about your data export, please contact support@floodilka.com

- Floodilka Team

unbanNotification.subject: Your Floodilka account suspension has been lifted
unbanNotification.body:
Hello {username},

Good news! Your Floodilka account suspension has been lifted.

Reason: {reason}

You can now log back into your account and continue using Floodilka.

- Floodilka Safety Team

scheduledDeletionNotification.subject: Your Floodilka account is scheduled for deletion
scheduledDeletionNotification.body:
Hello {username},

Your Floodilka account has been scheduled for permanent deletion.

Scheduled deletion date: {deletionDate, date, full} {deletionDate, time, short}
Reason: {reason}

This is a serious enforcement action. Your account data will be permanently deleted on the scheduled date.

If you believe this enforcement decision was incorrect, you may submit an appeal to appeals@floodilka.com from this email address.

- Floodilka Safety Team

giftChargebackNotification.subject: Your Floodilka Premium gift has been revoked
giftChargebackNotification.body:
Hello {username},

We're writing to inform you that the Floodilka Premium gift you redeemed has been revoked due to a payment dispute (chargeback) filed by the original purchaser.

Your premium benefits have been removed from your account. This action was taken because the payment for the gift was disputed and reversed.

If you have questions about this, please contact support@floodilka.com.

- Floodilka Team

reportResolved.subject: Your Floodilka report has been reviewed
reportResolved.body:
Hello {username},

Your report (ID: {reportId}) has been reviewed by our Safety Team.

Response from Safety Team:
{publicComment}

Thank you for helping keep Floodilka safe for everyone. We take all reports seriously and appreciate your contribution to our community.

If you have any questions or concerns about this resolution, please contact safety@floodilka.com.

- Floodilka Safety Team

dsaReportVerification.subject: Verify your email for a DSA report
dsaReportVerification.body:
Hello,

Use the following verification code to submit your Digital Services Act report on Floodilka:

{code}

This code expires at {expiresAt, date, full} {expiresAt, time, short}.

If you did not request this, please ignore this email.

- Floodilka Safety Team

emailChangeRevert.subject: Your Floodilka email was changed
emailChangeRevert.body:
Hello {username},

Your Floodilka account email was changed to {newEmail}.

If you made this change, no action is needed. If not, you can revert and secure your account using this link:

{revertUrl}

This will restore your previous email, sign you out everywhere, remove linked phone numbers, disable MFA, and require a new password.

- Floodilka Safety Team
